about1.subtitle: About Averra Cleaners
about1.title: A Clean Home is a Better Life
about1.description: At Averra Cleaners, we’re redefining home cleaning in Nairobi. Our team delivers residential and laundry, dishes, appliances, steam cleaning, and fabric care under one simple monthly plan.

services.description: A comprehensive cleaning plan designed to maintain a spotless residence without complex add-ons or hidden fees.

core.title: Core Essentials
core.description: Daily living care that keeps the rhythm of your home perfect.

deep.title: Deep Sanitation
deep.description: Surgical-level hygiene for the most important areas.

textile.title: Textile Luxury
textile.description: Restoring the original feel of your premium upholstery.

pricing1.title: Cleaning, Done Properly
pricing1.description: Tailored solutions for homes, businesses, and public institutions.

kenyaPlans.desc: Perfect for compact modern living with full-service care.
Balanced lifestyle cleaning with laundry & steam sanitation.
Deep care including fabrics, carpets & organization.
Premium apartment care with appliance detailing.
Family-scale service with ironing & full sanitation.

pricing1.everyPlanDescription: Standard quality checks and eco-friendly supplies provided by our specialized team.

contact2.title: Let’s start something fresh.
contact2.subtitle: Whether it's a studio in Nairobi or a corporate office in Kolwezi, we bring world-class standards to your doorstep.

cta.title: Can't find an answer?
cta.subtitle: Our concierge team is standing by.

questions.q: What’s included in the monthly package?
questions.a: Everything. From laundry and ironing to deep steam sanitation for kitchens and bathrooms. We provide 8 comprehensive sessions per month—no hidden fees, no exceptions.

questions.q: Can I choose my cleaning days?
questions.a: Absolutely. We work around your lifestyle. Whether it's a Tuesday/Friday rhythm or weekends, our team synchronizes with your schedule.
Simple, transparent monthly billing. We accept Mobile Money (M-Pesa/Airtel), Cards, or Bank Transfers—all paid in advance for uninterrupted service.

questions.q: Do you bring your own supplies?
questions.a: Yes. Our teams arrive fully equipped with industrial-grade steam cleaners and premium, eco-friendly detergents safe for pets and children.

questions.q: Is the staff vetted and safe?
questions.a: Security is our priority. Every Averra cleaner undergoes rigorous background checks and continuous professional training to ensure your peace of mind.

cta.title: Ready to Experience a Cleaner Tomorrow?
cta.description: Join hundreds of satisfied clients who’ve elevated their spaces with our professional cleaning solutions. Let’s make your world shine.

footer.description: Premium home & office cleaning services across Nairobi. Reliable, professional, and spotless results every time.

chatbot.title: Averra Assistant
suggestions: How much does a cleaning cost?

handoff.prompt: Would you like to continue on WhatsApp or send us an email for a faster, more personal response?

chatbot.system_prompt: You are Averra's friendly virtual assistant for a professional cleaning company based in Nairobi, Kenya and Kolwezi, DRC. You help customers with: booking and scheduling cleaning appointments, information about cleaning services (residential, commercial, deep cleaning, move-in/move-out, steam cleaning, laundry, ironing, appliance detailing, carpet/sofa/mattress care), pricing (Kenya: Studio Ksh 5000, 1BR Ksh 8000, 2BR Ksh 13000, 3BR Ksh 18000, 4BR Ksh 23500, 5BR Ksh 25000 — DRC: offices $40-300, schools $150-1000, hotels $200-1500, restaurants $120-700), and FAQs. Packages include 8 sessions/month. Payment via M-Pesa, Airtel, card, or bank transfer. Staff are vetted and background-checked. Eco-friendly supplies provided. Be warm, concise, and professional. If the user wants to book or get a quote, suggest they contact via WhatsApp or email. Company: Averra Cleaners. Email: hello@averracleaners.com. Kenya phone: +254 769 344 703.
